AoE2ScenarioParser.objects.support.new_effect 

   1from __future__ import annotations
   2
   3from typing import List
   4
   5from typing_extensions import deprecated
   6
   7from AoE2ScenarioParser.datasets.effects import EffectId
   8from AoE2ScenarioParser.datasets.trigger_lists import ObjectAttribute
   9from AoE2ScenarioParser.objects.data_objects.effect import Effect
  10
  11
  12class NewEffectSupport:
  13    def __init__(self, trigger_ref):
  14        self._trigger_ref = trigger_ref
  15
  16    def none(
  17            self,
  18    ) -> Effect:
  19        return self._trigger_ref._add_effect(
  20            EffectId.NONE,
  21        )
  22
  23    def change_diplomacy(
  24            self,
  25            diplomacy: int | None = None,
  26            source_player: int | None = None,
  27            target_player: int | None = None,
  28            mutual_diplomacy: bool | None = None,
  29    ) -> Effect:
  30        return self._trigger_ref._add_effect(
  31            EffectId.CHANGE_DIPLOMACY,
  32            diplomacy=diplomacy,
  33            source_player=source_player,
  34            target_player=target_player,
  35            mutual_diplomacy=mutual_diplomacy,
  36        )
  37
  38    def research_technology(
  39            self,
  40            source_player: int | None = None,
  41            technology: int | None = None,
  42            force_research_technology: int | None = None,
  43    ) -> Effect:
  44        return self._trigger_ref._add_effect(
  45            EffectId.RESEARCH_TECHNOLOGY,
  46            source_player=source_player,
  47            technology=technology,
  48            force_research_technology=force_research_technology,
  49        )
  50
  51    def send_chat(
  52            self,
  53            source_player: int | None = None,
  54            string_id: int | None = None,
  55            message: str | None = None,
  56            sound_name: str | None = None,
  57    ) -> Effect:
  58        return self._trigger_ref._add_effect(
  59            EffectId.SEND_CHAT,
  60            source_player=source_player,
  61            string_id=string_id,
  62            message=message,
  63            sound_name=sound_name,
  64        )
  65
  66    def play_sound(
  67            self,
  68            source_player: int | None = None,
  69            location_x: int | None = None,
  70            location_y: int | None = None,
  71            location_object_reference: int | None = None,
  72            global_sound: int | None = None,
  73            sound_name: str | None = None,
  74    ) -> Effect:
  75        return self._trigger_ref._add_effect(
  76            EffectId.PLAY_SOUND,
  77            source_player=source_player,
  78            location_x=location_x,
  79            location_y=location_y,
  80            location_object_reference=location_object_reference,
  81            global_sound=global_sound,
  82            sound_name=sound_name,
  83        )
  84
  85    def tribute(
  86            self,
  87            quantity: int | None = None,
  88            tribute_list: int | None = None,
  89            source_player: int | None = None,
  90            target_player: int | None = None,
  91    ) -> Effect:
  92        return self._trigger_ref._add_effect(
  93            EffectId.TRIBUTE,
  94            quantity=quantity,
  95            tribute_list=tribute_list,
  96            source_player=source_player,
  97            target_player=target_player,
  98        )
  99
 100    def unlock_gate(
 101            self,
 102            selected_object_ids: int | List[int] | None = None,
 103    ) -> Effect:
 104        return self._trigger_ref._add_effect(
 105            EffectId.UNLOCK_GATE,
 106            selected_object_ids=selected_object_ids,
 107        )
 108

 110            self,

 112    ) -> Effect:

 118    def activate_trigger(
 119            self,
 120            trigger_id: int | None = None,
 121    ) -> Effect:

 123            EffectId.ACTIVATE_TRIGGER,
 124            trigger_id=trigger_id,
 125        )

 145    def create_object(
 146            self,
 147            object_list_unit_id: int | None = None,
 148            source_player: int | None = None,
 149            location_x: int | None = None,
 150            location_y: int | None = None,
 151            facet: int | None = None,
 152            disable_sound: int | None = None,
 153    ) -> Effect:
 154        return self._trigger_ref._add_effect(
 155            EffectId.CREATE_OBJECT,
 156            object_list_unit_id=object_list_unit_id,
 157            source_player=source_player,
 158            location_x=location_x,
 159            location_y=location_y,
 160            facet=facet,
 161            disable_sound=disable_sound,
 162        )

 164    def task_object(
 165            self,
 166            object_list_unit_id: int | None = None,
 167            source_player: int | None = None,
 168            location_x: int | None = None,
 169            location_y: int | None = None,
 170            location_object_reference: int | None = None,
 171            area_x1: int | None = None,
 172            area_y1: int | None = None,
 173            area_x2: int | None = None,
 174            area_y2: int | None = None,
 175            object_group: int | None = None,
 176            object_type: int | None = None,
 177            action_type: int | None = None,
 178            selected_object_ids: int | List[int] | None = None,
 179            disable_garrison_unload_sound: int | None = None,
 180            max_units_affected: int | None = None,
 181            issue_group_command: int | None = None,
 182            queue_action: int | None = None,
 183    ) -> Effect:
 184        return self._trigger_ref._add_effect(
 185            EffectId.TASK_OBJECT,
 186            object_list_unit_id=object_list_unit_id,
 187            source_player=source_player,
 188            location_x=location_x,
 189            location_y=location_y,
 190            location_object_reference=location_object_reference,
 191            area_x1=area_x1,
 192            area_y1=area_y1,
 193            area_x2=area_x2,
 194            area_y2=area_y2,
 195            object_group=object_group,
 196            object_type=object_type,
 197            action_type=action_type,
 198            selected_object_ids=selected_object_ids,
 199            disable_garrison_unload_sound=disable_garrison_unload_sound,
 200            max_units_affected=max_units_affected,
 201            issue_group_command=issue_group_command,
 202            queue_action=queue_action,
 203        )

 273            self,
 274            quantity: int | None = None,
 275            source_player: int | None = None,
 276            location_x: int | None = None,

 552    def change_object_attack(
 553            self,
 554            armour_attack_quantity: int | None = None,
 555            armour_attack_class: int | None = None,
 556            object_list_unit_id: int | None = None,
 557            source_player: int | None = None,
 558            area_x1: int | None = None,
 559            area_y1: int | None = None,
 560            area_x2: int | None = None,
 561            area_y2: int | None = None,
 562            object_group: int | None = None,
 563            object_type: int | None = None,
 564            operation: int | None = None,
 565            selected_object_ids: int | List[int] | None = None,
 566            max_units_affected: int | None = None,
 567    ) -> Effect:
 568        return self._trigger_ref._add_effect(
 569            EffectId.CHANGE_OBJECT_ATTACK,
 570            armour_attack_quantity=armour_attack_quantity,
 571            armour_attack_class=armour_attack_class,
 572            object_list_unit_id=object_list_unit_id,
 573            source_player=source_player,
 574            area_x1=area_x1,
 575            area_y1=area_y1,
 576            area_x2=area_x2,
 577            area_y2=area_y2,
 578            object_group=object_group,
 579            object_type=object_type,
 580            operation=operation,
 581            selected_object_ids=selected_object_ids,
 582            max_units_affected=max_units_affected,
 583        )
 584
 585    def stop_object(
 586            self,
 587            object_list_unit_id: int | None = None,
 588            source_player: int | None = None,
 589            area_x1: int | None = None,
 590            area_y1: int | None = None,
 591            area_x2: int | None = None,
 592            area_y2: int | None = None,
 593            object_group: int | None = None,
 594            object_type: int | None = None,
 595            selected_object_ids: int | List[int] | None = None,
 596            max_units_affected: int | None = None,
 597    ) -> Effect:
 598        return self._trigger_ref._add_effect(
 599            EffectId.STOP_OBJECT,
 600            object_list_unit_id=object_list_unit_id,
 601            source_player=source_player,
 602            area_x1=area_x1,
 603            area_y1=area_y1,
 604            area_x2=area_x2,
 605            area_y2=area_y2,
 606            object_group=object_group,
 607            object_type=object_type,
 608            selected_object_ids=selected_object_ids,
 609            max_units_affected=max_units_affected,
 610        )

 639            object_group=object_group,
 640            object_type=object_type,
 641            selected_object_ids=selected_object_ids,
 642            max_units_affected=max_units_affected,
 643        )

 943            area_y1: int | None = None,
 944            area_x2: int | None = None,
 945            area_y2: int | None = None,

 950            facet2: int | None = None,

 952    ) -> Effect:
 953        return self._trigger_ref._add_effect(
 954            EffectId.REPLACE_OBJECT,

 957            target_player=target_player,
 958            area_x1=area_x1,
 959            area_y1=area_y1,
 960            area_x2=area_x2,
 961            area_y2=area_y2,

 967            max_units_affected=max_units_affected,
 968        )

1058            self,
1059            object_list_unit_id: int | None = None,
1060            source_player: int | None = None,
1061            area_x1: int | None = None,
1062            area_y1: int | None = None,
1063            area_x2: int | None = None,
1064            area_y2: int | None = None,
1065            object_list_unit_id_2: int | None = None,
1066            selected_object_ids: int | List[int] | None = None,
1067            max_units_affected: int | None = None,
1068            disable_sound: int | None = None,
1069    ) -> Effect:
1070        return self._trigger_ref._add_effect(
1071            EffectId.CREATE_GARRISONED_OBJECT,
1072            object_list_unit_id=object_list_unit_id,
1073            source_player=source_player,
1074            area_x1=area_x1,
1075            area_y1=area_y1,
1076            area_x2=area_x2,
1077            area_y2=area_y2,
1078            object_list_unit_id_2=object_list_unit_id_2,
1079            selected_object_ids=selected_object_ids,
1080            max_units_affected=max_units_affected,
1081            disable_sound=disable_sound,
1082        )
1083
1084    def acknowledge_ai_signal(
1085            self,
1086            ai_signal_value: int | None = None,
1087    ) -> Effect:
1088        return self._trigger_ref._add_effect(
1089            EffectId.ACKNOWLEDGE_AI_SIGNAL,
1090            ai_signal_value=ai_signal_value,
1091        )
1092
1093    def modify_attribute(
1094            self,
1095            quantity: int | None = None,
1096            armour_attack_quantity: int | None = None,
1097            armour_attack_class: int | None = None,
1098            object_list_unit_id: int | None = None,
1099            source_player: int | None = None,
1100            operation: int | None = None,
1101            object_attributes: int | None = None,
1102            message: str | None = None,
1103    ) -> Effect:
1104        """
1105        The parameters 'armour_attack_quantity' and 'armour_attack_class' are only used when object_attributes is Armor
1106        or Attack (8 or 9). Use, 'quantity' otherwise.
1107        """
1108        if (armour_attack_quantity is not None or armour_attack_class is not None) and quantity is not None:
1109            raise ValueError("Cannot use 'armour_attack' attributes together with the 'quantity' attribute.")
1110
1111        return self._trigger_ref._add_effect(
1112            EffectId.MODIFY_ATTRIBUTE,
1113            quantity=quantity,
1114            armour_attack_quantity=armour_attack_quantity,
1115            armour_attack_class=armour_attack_class,
1116            object_list_unit_id=object_list_unit_id,
1117            source_player=source_player,
1118            operation=operation,
1119            object_attributes=object_attributes,
1120            message=message
1121        )
1122
1123    def modify_resource(
1124            self,
1125            quantity: int | None = None,
1126            tribute_list: int | None = None,
1127            source_player: int | None = None,
1128            operation: int | None = None,
1129    ) -> Effect:
1130        return self._trigger_ref._add_effect(
1131            EffectId.MODIFY_RESOURCE,
1132            quantity=quantity,
1133            tribute_list=tribute_list,
1134            source_player=source_player,
1135            operation=operation,
1136        )
1137
1138    def modify_resource_by_variable(
1139            self,
1140            tribute_list: int | None = None,
1141            source_player: int | None = None,
1142            operation: int | None = None,
1143            variable: int | None = None,
1144    ) -> Effect:
1145        return self._trigger_ref._add_effect(
1146            EffectId.MODIFY_RESOURCE_BY_VARIABLE,
1147            tribute_list=tribute_list,
1148            source_player=source_player,
1149            operation=operation,
1150            variable=variable,
1151        )
1152
1153    def set_building_gather_point(
1154            self,
1155            object_list_unit_id: int | None = None,
1156            source_player: int | None = None,
1157            location_x: int | None = None,
1158            location_y: int | None = None,
1159            area_x1: int | None = None,
1160            area_y1: int | None = None,
1161            area_x2: int | None = None,
1162            area_y2: int | None = None,
1163            selected_object_ids: int | List[int] | None = None,
1164            max_units_affected: int | None = None,
1165    ) -> Effect:
1166        return self._trigger_ref._add_effect(
1167            EffectId.SET_BUILDING_GATHER_POINT,
1168            object_list_unit_id=object_list_unit_id,
1169            source_player=source_player,
1170            location_x=location_x,
1171            location_y=location_y,
1172            area_x1=area_x1,
1173            area_y1=area_y1,
1174            area_x2=area_x2,
1175            area_y2=area_y2,
1176            selected_object_ids=selected_object_ids,
1177            max_units_affected=max_units_affected,
1178        )
1179
1180    def script_call(
1181            self,
1182            string_id: int | None = None,
1183            message: str | None = None,
1184    ) -> Effect:
1185        return self._trigger_ref._add_effect(
1186            EffectId.SCRIPT_CALL,
1187            string_id=string_id,
1188            message=message,
1189        )
1190
1191    def change_variable(
1192            self,
1193            quantity: int | None = None,
1194            operation: int | None = None,
1195            variable: int | None = None,
1196            message: str | None = None,
1197    ) -> Effect:
1198        return self._trigger_ref._add_effect(
1199            EffectId.CHANGE_VARIABLE,
1200            quantity=quantity,
1201            operation=operation,
1202            variable=variable,
1203            message=message,
1204        )
1205

1207            self,

1209    ) -> Effect:
1210        return self._trigger_ref._add_effect(

1212            timer=timer,
1213        )

1539    def train_unit(
1540            self,

1542            object_list_unit_id: int | None = None,
1543            source_player: int | None = None,
1544            location_x: int | None = None,
1545            location_y: int | None = None,
1546            area_x1: int | None = None,
1547            area_y1: int | None = None,
1548            area_x2: int | None = None,
1549            area_y2: int | None = None,
1550            selected_object_ids: int | List[int] | None = None,
1551            max_units_affected: int | None = None,
1552    ):
1553        return self._trigger_ref._add_effect(
1554            EffectId.TRAIN_UNIT,
1555            quantity=quantity,
1556            object_list_unit_id=object_list_unit_id,
1557            source_player=source_player,
1558            location_x=location_x,
1559            location_y=location_y,
1560            area_x1=area_x1,
1561            area_y1=area_y1,
1562            area_x2=area_x2,
1563            area_y2=area_y2,
1564            selected_object_ids=selected_object_ids,
1565            max_units_affected=max_units_affected,
1566        )

1568    def initiate_research(
1569            self,
1570            source_player: int | None = None,

1581    def create_object_attack(
1582            self,
1583            armour_attack_quantity: int | None = None,
1584            armour_attack_class: int | None = None,
1585            object_list_unit_id: int | None = None,
1586            source_player: int | None = None,
1587            area_x1: int | None = None,
1588            area_y1: int | None = None,
1589            area_x2: int | None = None,
1590            area_y2: int | None = None,
1591            object_group: int | None = None,
1592            object_type: int | None = None,
1593            operation: int | None = None,
1594            selected_object_ids: int | List[int] | None = None,
1595            max_units_affected: int | None = None,
1596    ):
1597        return self._trigger_ref._add_effect(
1598            EffectId.CREATE_OBJECT_ATTACK,
1599            armour_attack_quantity=armour_attack_quantity,
1600            armour_attack_class=armour_attack_class,
1601            object_list_unit_id=object_list_unit_id,
1602            source_player=source_player,
1603            area_x1=area_x1,
1604            area_y1=area_y1,
1605            area_x2=area_x2,
1606            area_y2=area_y2,
1607            object_group=object_group,
1608            object_type=object_type,
1609            operation=operation,
1610            selected_object_ids=selected_object_ids,
1611            max_units_affected=max_units_affected,
1612        )
1613
1614    def create_object_armor(
1615            self,
1616            armour_attack_quantity: int | None = None,
1617            armour_attack_class: int | None = None,
1618            object_list_unit_id: int | None = None,
1619            source_player: int | None = None,
1620            area_x1: int | None = None,
1621            area_y1: int | None = None,
1622            area_x2: int | None = None,
1623            area_y2: int | None = None,
1624            object_group: int | None = None,
1625            object_type: int | None = None,
1626            operation: int | None = None,
1627            selected_object_ids: int | List[int] | None = None,
1628            max_units_affected: int | None = None,
1629    ):
1630        return self._trigger_ref._add_effect(
1631            EffectId.CREATE_OBJECT_ARMOR,
1632            armour_attack_quantity=armour_attack_quantity,
1633            armour_attack_class=armour_attack_class,
1634            object_list_unit_id=object_list_unit_id,
1635            source_player=source_player,
1636            area_x1=area_x1,
1637            area_y1=area_y1,
1638            area_x2=area_x2,
1639            area_y2=area_y2,
1640            object_group=object_group,
1641            object_type=object_type,
1642            operation=operation,
1643            selected_object_ids=selected_object_ids,
1644            max_units_affected=max_units_affected,
1645        )
1646
1647    def modify_attribute_by_variable(
1648            self,
1649            object_list_unit_id: int | None = None,
1650            source_player: int | None = None,
1651            operation: int | None = None,
1652            object_attributes: int | None = None,
1653            variable: int | None = None,
1654            message: str | None = None,
1655            armour_attack_class: int | None = None,
1656    ):
1657        if armour_attack_class is not None and object_attributes not in (ObjectAttribute.ATTACK, ObjectAttribute.ARMOR):
1658            raise ValueError("Cannot use 'armour_attack_class' for non attack/armor attributes.")
1659
1660        return self._trigger_ref._add_effect(
1661            EffectId.MODIFY_ATTRIBUTE_BY_VARIABLE,
1662            armour_attack_class=armour_attack_class,
1663            object_list_unit_id=object_list_unit_id,
1664            source_player=source_player,
1665            operation=operation,
1666            object_attributes=object_attributes,
1667            variable=variable,
1668            message=message,
1669        )
1670
1671    def set_object_cost(
1672            self,
1673            object_list_unit_id: int | None = None,
1674            source_player: int | None = None,
1675            quantity: int | None = None,
1676            tribute_list: int | None = None,
1677    ) -> Effect:
1678        return self._trigger_ref._add_effect(
1679            EffectId.SET_OBJECT_COST,
1680            object_list_unit_id=object_list_unit_id,
1681            source_player=source_player,
1682            quantity=quantity,
1683            tribute_list=tribute_list,
1684        )
1685

1696            quantity=quantity,
1697        )

1760    def modify_variable_by_attribute(
1761            self,
1762            object_list_unit_id: int | None = None,
1763            source_player: int | None = None,
1764            operation: int | None = None,
1765            object_attributes: int | None = None,
1766            variable: int | None = None,
1767            message: str | None = None,
1768            armour_attack_class: int | None = None,
1769    ):
1770        if armour_attack_class is not None and object_attributes not in (ObjectAttribute.ATTACK, ObjectAttribute.ARMOR):
1771            raise ValueError("Cannot use 'armour_attack_class' for non attack/armor attributes.")
1772
1773        return self._trigger_ref._add_effect(
1774            EffectId.MODIFY_VARIABLE_BY_ATTRIBUTE,
1775            armour_attack_class=armour_attack_class,
1776            object_list_unit_id=object_list_unit_id,
1777            source_player=source_player,
1778            operation=operation,
1779            object_attributes=object_attributes,
1780            variable=variable,
1781            message=message
1782        )
1783
1784    def change_object_caption(
1785            self,
1786            object_list_unit_id: int | None = None,
1787            source_player: int | None = None,
1788            string_id: int | None = None,
1789            message: str | None = None,
1790            area_x1: int | None = None,
1791            area_y1: int | None = None,
1792            area_x2: int | None = None,
1793            area_y2: int | None = None,
1794            selected_object_ids: int | List[int] | None = None,
1795    ):
1796        return self._trigger_ref._add_effect(
1797            EffectId.CHANGE_OBJECT_CAPTION,
1798            object_list_unit_id=object_list_unit_id,
1799            source_player=source_player,
1800            string_id=string_id,
1801            message=message,
1802            area_x1=area_x1,
1803            area_y1=area_y1,
1804            area_x2=area_x2,
1805            area_y2=area_y2,
1806            selected_object_ids=selected_object_ids,
1807        )
1808
1809    def change_player_color(
1810            self,
1811            source_player: int | None = None,
1812            player_color: int | None = None,
1813    ):
1814        return self._trigger_ref._add_effect(
1815            EffectId.CHANGE_PLAYER_COLOR,
1816            source_player=source_player,
1817            player_color=player_color,
1818        )
1819
1820    def create_decision(
1821            self,
1822            decision_id: int | None = None,
1823            string_id: int | None = None,
1824            message: str | None = None,
1825            string_id_option1: int | None = None,
1826            message_option1: str | None = None,
1827            string_id_option2: int | None = None,
1828            message_option2: str | None = None,
1829    ):
1830        return self._trigger_ref._add_effect(
1831            EffectId.CREATE_DECISION,
1832            decision_id=decision_id,
1833            string_id=string_id,
1834            message=message,
1835            string_id_option1=string_id_option1,
1836            message_option1=message_option1,
1837            string_id_option2=string_id_option2,
1838            message_option2=message_option2,
1839        )
1840
1841    def disable_unit_attackable(
1842            self,
1843            object_list_unit_id: int | None = None,
1844            source_player: int | None = None,
1845            area_x1: int | None = None,
1846            area_y1: int | None = None,
1847            area_x2: int | None = None,
1848            area_y2: int | None = None,
1849            selected_object_ids: int | List[int] | None = None,
1850            max_units_affected: int | None = None,
1851    ) -> Effect:
1852        return self._trigger_ref._add_effect(
1853            EffectId.DISABLE_UNIT_ATTACKABLE,
1854            object_list_unit_id=object_list_unit_id,
1855            source_player=source_player,
1856            area_x1=area_x1,
1857            area_y1=area_y1,
1858            area_x2=area_x2,
1859            area_y2=area_y2,
1860            selected_object_ids=selected_object_ids,
1861            max_units_affected=max_units_affected,
1862        )
1863
1864    def enable_unit_attackable(
1865            self,
1866            object_list_unit_id: int | None = None,
1867            source_player: int | None = None,
1868            area_x1: int | None = None,
1869            area_y1: int | None = None,
1870            area_x2: int | None = None,
1871            area_y2: int | None = None,
1872            selected_object_ids: int | List[int] | None = None,
1873            max_units_affected: int | None = None,
1874    ) -> Effect:
1875        return self._trigger_ref._add_effect(
1876            EffectId.ENABLE_UNIT_ATTACKABLE,
1877            object_list_unit_id=object_list_unit_id,
1878            source_player=source_player,
1879            area_x1=area_x1,
1880            area_y1=area_y1,
1881            area_x2=area_x2,
1882            area_y2=area_y2,
1883            selected_object_ids=selected_object_ids,
1884            max_units_affected=max_units_affected,
1885        )
1886
1887    def modify_variable_by_variable(
1888            self,
1889            variable: int | None = None,
1890            operation: int | None = None,
1891            variable2: int | None = None,
1892    ):
1893        """
1894        How it works:
1895
1896        variable { operation }= variable2
1897
1898        Examples:
1899
1900            Operation.SET: variable = variable2
1901            Operation.ADD: variable = variable + variable2
1902            Operation.SUBTRACT: variable = variable - variable2
1903            Operation.DIVIDE: variable = variable / variable2
1904            Operation.MULTIPLY: variable = variable * variable2
1905        """
1906        return self._trigger_ref._add_effect(
1907            EffectId.MODIFY_VARIABLE_BY_VARIABLE,
1908            variable=variable,  # Destination!
1909            operation=operation,
1910            variable2=variable2,  # Modifier!
1911        )
1912
1913    def count_units_into_variable(
1914            self,
1915            object_list_unit_id: int | None = None,
1916            source_player: int | None = None,
1917            area_x1: int | None = None,
1918            area_y1: int | None = None,
1919            area_x2: int | None = None,
1920            area_y2: int | None = None,
1921            object_group: int | None = None,
1922            variable2: int | None = None,
1923    ):
1924        return self._trigger_ref._add_effect(
1925            EffectId.COUNT_UNITS_INTO_VARIABLE,
1926            object_list_unit_id=object_list_unit_id,
1927            source_player=source_player,
1928            area_x1=area_x1,
1929            area_y1=area_y1,
1930            area_x2=area_x2,
1931            area_y2=area_y2,
1932            object_group=object_group,
1933            variable2=variable2,
1934        )
1935
1936    def add_train_location(
1937            self,
1938            object_list_unit_id: int | None = None,
1939            source_player: int | None = None,
1940            object_list_unit_id_2: int | None = None,
1941            button_location: int | None = None,
1942            train_time: int | None = None,
1943            hotkey: int | None = None,
1944    ):
1945        return self._trigger_ref._add_effect(
1946            EffectId.ADD_TRAIN_LOCATION,
1947            object_list_unit_id=object_list_unit_id,
1948            source_player=source_player,
1949            object_list_unit_id_2=object_list_unit_id_2,
1950            button_location=button_location,
1951            train_time=train_time,
1952            hotkey=hotkey,
1953        )
1954
1955    def research_local_technology(
1956            self,
1957            local_technology: int | None = None,
1958            source_player: int | None = None,
1959            selected_object_ids: int | List[int] | None = None,
1960            area_x1: int | None = None,
1961            area_y1: int | None = None,
1962            area_x2: int | None = None,
1963            area_y2: int | None = None,
1964            object_list_unit_id_2: int | None = None,
1965    ):
1966        return self._trigger_ref._add_effect(
1967            EffectId.RESEARCH_LOCAL_TECHNOLOGY,
1968            local_technology=local_technology,
1969            source_player=source_player,
1970            selected_object_ids=selected_object_ids,
1971            area_x1=area_x1,
1972            area_y1=area_y1,
1973            area_x2=area_x2,
1974            area_y2=area_y2,
1975            object_list_unit_id_2=object_list_unit_id_2,
1976        )
1977
1978    def modify_attribute_for_class(
1979            self,
1980            object_group2: int | None = None,
1981            object_type2: int | None = None,
1982            source_player: int | None = None,
1983            object_attributes: int | None = None,
1984            message: int | None = None,
1985            operation: int | None = None,
1986            quantity: int | float | None = None,
1987            armour_attack_quantity: int | None = None,
1988            armour_attack_class: int | None = None,
1989    ):
1990        if (armour_attack_quantity is not None or armour_attack_class is not None) and quantity is not None:
1991            raise ValueError("Cannot use 'armour_attack' attributes together with the 'quantity' attribute.")
1992
1993        return self._trigger_ref._add_effect(
1994            EffectId.MODIFY_ATTRIBUTE_FOR_CLASS,
1995            object_group2=object_group2,
1996            object_type2=object_type2,
1997            source_player=source_player,
1998            object_attributes=object_attributes,
1999            message=message,
2000            operation=operation,
2001            quantity=quantity,
2002            armour_attack_quantity=armour_attack_quantity,
2003            armour_attack_class=armour_attack_class,
2004        )
2005
2006    def modify_object_attribute(
2007            self,
2008            object_list_unit_id: int | None = None,
2009            source_player: int | None = None,
2010            object_attributes: int | None = None,
2011            selected_object_ids: int | List[int] | None = None,
2012            area_x1: int | None = None,
2013            area_y1: int | None = None,
2014            area_x2: int | None = None,
2015            area_y2: int | None = None,
2016            operation: int | None = None,
2017            message: str | None = None,
2018            quantity: int | float | None = None,
2019            armour_attack_quantity: int | None = None,
2020            armour_attack_class: int | None = None,
2021    ):
2022        if (armour_attack_quantity is not None or armour_attack_class is not None) and quantity is not None:
2023            raise ValueError("Cannot use 'armour_attack' attributes together with the 'quantity' attribute.")
2024
2025        return self._trigger_ref._add_effect(
2026            EffectId.MODIFY_OBJECT_ATTRIBUTE,
2027            object_list_unit_id=object_list_unit_id,
2028            source_player=source_player,
2029            object_attributes=object_attributes,
2030            selected_object_ids=selected_object_ids,
2031            area_x1=area_x1,
2032            area_y1=area_y1,
2033            area_x2=area_x2,
2034            area_y2=area_y2,
2035            operation=operation,
2036            message=message,
2037            quantity=quantity,
2038            armour_attack_quantity=armour_attack_quantity,
2039            armour_attack_class=armour_attack_class,
2040        )
2041
2042    def modify_object_attribute_by_variable(
2043            self,
2044            object_list_unit_id: int | None = None,
2045            source_player: int | None = None,
2046            object_attributes: int | None = None,
2047            selected_object_ids: int | List[int] | None = None,
2048            area_x1: int | None = None,
2049            area_y1: int | None = None,
2050            area_x2: int | None = None,
2051            area_y2: int | None = None,
2052            operation: int | None = None,
2053            message: str | None = None,
2054            variable: int | None = None,
2055            armour_attack_class: int | None = None,
2056    ):
2057
2058        if armour_attack_class is not None and object_attributes not in (ObjectAttribute.ATTACK, ObjectAttribute.ARMOR):
2059            raise ValueError("Cannot use 'armour_attack_class' for non attack/armor attributes.")
2060
2061        return self._trigger_ref._add_effect(
2062            EffectId.MODIFY_OBJECT_ATTRIBUTE_BY_VARIABLE,
2063            object_list_unit_id=object_list_unit_id,
2064            source_player=source_player,
2065            object_attributes=object_attributes,
2066            selected_object_ids=selected_object_ids,
2067            area_x1=area_x1,
2068            area_y1=area_y1,
2069            area_x2=area_x2,
2070            area_y2=area_y2,
2071            operation=operation,
2072            message=message,
2073            variable=variable,
2074            armour_attack_class=armour_attack_class,
2075        )
2076
2077    def change_object_visibility(
2078            self,
2079            source_player: int | None = None,
2080            target_player: int | None = None,
2081            area_x1: int | None = None,
2082            area_y1: int | None = None,
2083            area_x2: int | None = None,
2084            area_y2: int | None = None,
2085            visibility_state: int | None = None,
2086            max_units_affected: int | None = None,
2087            selected_object_ids: int | None = None,
2088    ):
2089        return self._trigger_ref._add_effect(
2090            EffectId.CHANGE_OBJECT_VISIBILITY,
2091            source_player=source_player,
2092            target_player=target_player,
2093            area_x1=area_x1,
2094            area_y1=area_y1,
2095            area_x2=area_x2,
2096            area_y2=area_y2,
2097            visibility_state=visibility_state,
2098            max_units_affected=max_units_affected,
2099            selected_object_ids=selected_object_ids,
2100        )
2101
2102    def build_object(
2103            self,
2104            object_list_unit_id: int | None = None,
2105            source_player: int | None = None,
2106            location_x: int | None = None,
2107            location_y: int | None = None,
2108            location_object_reference: int | None = None,
2109            area_x1: int | None = None,
2110            area_y1: int | None = None,
2111            area_x2: int | None = None,
2112            area_y2: int | None = None,
2113            wall_x1: int | None = None,
2114            wall_y1: int | None = None,
2115            wall_x2: int | None = None,
2116            wall_y2: int | None = None,
2117            object_group: int | None = None,
2118            object_type: int | None = None,
2119            building_list: int | None = None,
2120            selected_object_ids: int | List[int] | None = None,
2121            disable_garrison_unload_sound: int | None = None,
2122            max_units_affected: int | None = None,
2123            issue_group_command: int | None = None,
2124            queue_action: int | None = None,
2125    ) -> Effect:
2126        return self._trigger_ref._add_effect(
2127            EffectId.BUILD_OBJECT,
2128            object_list_unit_id=object_list_unit_id,
2129            source_player=source_player,
2130            location_x=location_x,
2131            location_y=location_y,
2132            location_object_reference=location_object_reference,
2133            area_x1=area_x1,
2134            area_y1=area_y1,
2135            area_x2=area_x2,
2136            area_y2=area_y2,
2137            wall_x1=wall_x1,
2138            wall_y1=wall_y1,
2139            wall_x2=wall_x2,
2140            wall_y2=wall_y2,
2141            object_group=object_group,
2142            object_type=object_type,
2143            building_list=building_list,
2144            selected_object_ids=selected_object_ids,
2145            disable_garrison_unload_sound=disable_garrison_unload_sound,
2146            max_units_affected=max_units_affected,
2147            issue_group_command=issue_group_command,
2148            queue_action=queue_action,
2149        )
class NewEffectSupport: 
  13class NewEffectSupport:
  14    def __init__(self, trigger_ref):
  15        self._trigger_ref = trigger_ref
  16
  17    def none(
  18            self,
  19    ) -> Effect:
  20        return self._trigger_ref._add_effect(
  21            EffectId.NONE,
  22        )
  23
  24    def change_diplomacy(
  25            self,
  26            diplomacy: int | None = None,
  27            source_player: int | None = None,
  28            target_player: int | None = None,
  29            mutual_diplomacy: bool | None = None,
  30    ) -> Effect:
  31        return self._trigger_ref._add_effect(
  32            EffectId.CHANGE_DIPLOMACY,
  33            diplomacy=diplomacy,
  34            source_player=source_player,
  35            target_player=target_player,
  36            mutual_diplomacy=mutual_diplomacy,
  37        )
  38
  39    def research_technology(
  40            self,
  41            source_player: int | None = None,
  42            technology: int | None = None,
  43            force_research_technology: int | None = None,
  44    ) -> Effect:
  45        return self._trigger_ref._add_effect(
  46            EffectId.RESEARCH_TECHNOLOGY,
  47            source_player=source_player,
  48            technology=technology,
  49            force_research_technology=force_research_technology,
  50        )
  51
  52    def send_chat(
  53            self,
  54            source_player: int | None = None,
  55            string_id: int | None = None,
  56            message: str | None = None,
  57            sound_name: str | None = None,
  58    ) -> Effect:
  59        return self._trigger_ref._add_effect(
  60            EffectId.SEND_CHAT,
  61            source_player=source_player,
  62            string_id=string_id,
  63            message=message,
  64            sound_name=sound_name,
  65        )
  66
  67    def play_sound(
  68            self,
  69            source_player: int | None = None,
  70            location_x: int | None = None,
  71            location_y: int | None = None,
  72            location_object_reference: int | None = None,
  73            global_sound: int | None = None,
  74            sound_name: str | None = None,
  75    ) -> Effect:
  76        return self._trigger_ref._add_effect(
  77            EffectId.PLAY_SOUND,
  78            source_player=source_player,
  79            location_x=location_x,
  80            location_y=location_y,
  81            location_object_reference=location_object_reference,
  82            global_sound=global_sound,
  83            sound_name=sound_name,
  84        )
  85
  86    def tribute(
  87            self,
  88            quantity: int | None = None,
  89            tribute_list: int | None = None,
  90            source_player: int | None = None,
  91            target_player: int | None = None,
  92    ) -> Effect:
  93        return self._trigger_ref._add_effect(
  94            EffectId.TRIBUTE,
  95            quantity=quantity,
  96            tribute_list=tribute_list,
  97            source_player=source_player,
  98            target_player=target_player,
  99        )
 100
 101    def unlock_gate(
 102            self,
 103            selected_object_ids: int | List[int] | None = None,
 104    ) -> Effect:
 105        return self._trigger_ref._add_effect(
 106            EffectId.UNLOCK_GATE,
 107            selected_object_ids=selected_object_ids,
 108        )
 109
 110    def lock_gate(
 111            self,
 112            selected_object_ids: int | List[int] | None = None,
 113    ) -> Effect:
 114        return self._trigger_ref._add_effect(
 115            EffectId.LOCK_GATE,
 116            selected_object_ids=selected_object_ids,
 117        )
 118
 119    def activate_trigger(
 120            self,
 121            trigger_id: int | None = None,
 122    ) -> Effect:
 123        return self._trigger_ref._add_effect(
 124            EffectId.ACTIVATE_TRIGGER,
 125            trigger_id=trigger_id,
 126        )
 127
 128    def deactivate_trigger(
 129            self,
 130            trigger_id: int | None = None,
 131    ) -> Effect:
 132        return self._trigger_ref._add_effect(
 133            EffectId.DEACTIVATE_TRIGGER,
 134            trigger_id=trigger_id,
 135        )
 136
 137    def ai_script_goal(
 138            self,
 139            ai_script_goal: int | None = None,
 140    ) -> Effect:
 141        return self._trigger_ref._add_effect(
 142            EffectId.AI_SCRIPT_GOAL,
 143            ai_script_goal=ai_script_goal,
 144        )
 145
 146    def create_object(
 147            self,
 148            object_list_unit_id: int | None = None,
 149            source_player: int | None = None,
 150            location_x: int | None = None,
 151            location_y: int | None = None,
 152            facet: int | None = None,
 153            disable_sound: int | None = None,
 154    ) -> Effect:
 155        return self._trigger_ref._add_effect(
 156            EffectId.CREATE_OBJECT,
 157            object_list_unit_id=object_list_unit_id,
 158            source_player=source_player,
 159            location_x=location_x,
 160            location_y=location_y,
 161            facet=facet,
 162            disable_sound=disable_sound,
 163        )
 164
 165    def task_object(
 166            self,
 167            object_list_unit_id: int | None = None,
 168            source_player: int | None = None,
 169            location_x: int | None = None,
 170            location_y: int | None = None,
 171            location_object_reference: int | None = None,
 172            area_x1: int | None = None,
 173            area_y1: int | None = None,
 174            area_x2: int | None = None,
 175            area_y2: int | None = None,
 176            object_group: int | None = None,
 177            object_type: int | None = None,
 178            action_type: int | None = None,
 179            selected_object_ids: int | List[int] | None = None,
 180            disable_garrison_unload_sound: int | None = None,
 181            max_units_affected: int | None = None,
 182            issue_group_command: int | None = None,
 183            queue_action: int | None = None,
 184    ) -> Effect:
 185        return self._trigger_ref._add_effect(
 186            EffectId.TASK_OBJECT,
 187            object_list_unit_id=object_list_unit_id,
 188            source_player=source_player,
 189            location_x=location_x,
 190            location_y=location_y,
 191            location_object_reference=location_object_reference,
 192            area_x1=area_x1,
 193            area_y1=area_y1,
 194            area_x2=area_x2,
 195            area_y2=area_y2,
 196            object_group=object_group,
 197            object_type=object_type,
 198            action_type=action_type,
 199            selected_object_ids=selected_object_ids,
 200            disable_garrison_unload_sound=disable_garrison_unload_sound,
 201            max_units_affected=max_units_affected,
 202            issue_group_command=issue_group_command,
 203            queue_action=queue_action,
 204        )
 205
 206    def declare_victory(
 207            self,
 208            source_player: int | None = None,
 209            enabled: int | None = None,
 210    ) -> Effect:
 211        return self._trigger_ref._add_effect(
 212            EffectId.DECLARE_VICTORY,
 213            source_player=source_player,
 214            enabled=enabled,
 215        )
 216
 217    def kill_object(
 218            self,
 219            object_list_unit_id: int | None = None,
 220            source_player: int | None = None,
 221            area_x1: int | None = None,
 222            area_y1: int | None = None,
 223            area_x2: int | None = None,
 224            area_y2: int | None = None,
 225            object_group: int | None = None,
 226            object_type: int | None = None,
 227            selected_object_ids: int | List[int] | None = None,
 228            max_units_affected: int | None = None,
 229    ) -> Effect:
 230        return self._trigger_ref._add_effect(
 231            EffectId.KILL_OBJECT,
 232            object_list_unit_id=object_list_unit_id,
 233            source_player=source_player,
 234            area_x1=area_x1,
 235            area_y1=area_y1,
 236            area_x2=area_x2,
 237            area_y2=area_y2,
 238            object_group=object_group,
 239            object_type=object_type,
 240            selected_object_ids=selected_object_ids,
 241            max_units_affected=max_units_affected,
 242        )
 243
 244    def remove_object(
 245            self,
 246            object_list_unit_id: int | None = None,
 247            source_player: int | None = None,
 248            area_x1: int | None = None,
 249            area_y1: int | None = None,
 250            area_x2: int | None = None,
 251            area_y2: int | None = None,
 252            object_group: int | None = None,
 253            object_type: int | None = None,
 254            object_state: int | None = None,
 255            selected_object_ids: int | List[int] | None = None,
 256            max_units_affected: int | None = None,
 257    ) -> Effect:
 258        return self._trigger_ref._add_effect(
 259            EffectId.REMOVE_OBJECT,
 260            object_list_unit_id=object_list_unit_id,
 261            source_player=source_player,
 262            area_x1=area_x1,
 263            area_y1=area_y1,
 264            area_x2=area_x2,
 265            area_y2=area_y2,
 266            object_group=object_group,
 267            object_type=object_type,
 268            object_state=object_state,
 269            selected_object_ids=selected_object_ids,
 270            max_units_affected=max_units_affected,
 271        )
 272
 273    def change_view(
 274            self,
 275            quantity: int | None = None,
 276            source_player: int | None = None,
 277            location_x: int | None = None,
 278            location_y: int | None = None,
 279            scroll: int | None = None,
 280    ) -> Effect:
 281        return self._trigger_ref._add_effect(
 282            EffectId.CHANGE_VIEW,
 283            quantity=quantity,
 284            source_player=source_player,
 285            location_x=location_x,
 286            location_y=location_y,
 287            scroll=scroll,
 288        )
 289
 290    def unload(
 291            self,
 292            object_list_unit_id: int | None = None,
 293            source_player: int | None = None,
 294            location_x: int | None = None,
 295            location_y: int | None = None,
 296            location_object_reference: int | None = None,
 297            area_x1: int | None = None,
 298            area_y1: int | None = None,
 299            area_x2: int | None = None,
 300            area_y2: int | None = None,
 301            object_group: int | None = None,
 302            object_type: int | None = None,
 303            selected_object_ids: int | List[int] | None = None,
 304            max_units_affected: int | None = None,
 305    ) -> Effect:
 306        return self._trigger_ref._add_effect(
 307            EffectId.UNLOAD,
 308            object_list_unit_id=object_list_unit_id,
 309            source_player=source_player,
 310            location_x=location_x,
 311            location_y=location_y,
 312            location_object_reference=location_object_reference,
 313            area_x1=area_x1,
 314            area_y1=area_y1,
 315            area_x2=area_x2,
 316            area_y2=area_y2,
 317            object_group=object_group,
 318            object_type=object_type,
 319            selected_object_ids=selected_object_ids,
 320            max_units_affected=max_units_affected,
 321        )
 322
 323    def change_ownership(
 324            self,
 325            object_list_unit_id: int | None = None,
 326            source_player: int | None = None,
 327            target_player: int | None = None,

 330            area_x2: int | None = None,
 331            area_y2: int | None = None,
 332            object_group: int | None = None,

 334            flash_object: int | None = None,
 335            selected_object_ids: int | List[int] | None = None,
 336            max_units_affected: int | None = None,
 337    ) -> Effect:
 338        return self._trigger_ref._add_effect(
 339            EffectId.CHANGE_OWNERSHIP,
 340            object_list_unit_id=object_list_unit_id,
 341            source_player=source_player,
 342            target_player=target_player,
 343            area_x1=area_x1,
 344            area_y1=area_y1,
 345            area_x2=area_x2,
 346            area_y2=area_y2,
 347            object_group=object_group,
 348            object_type=object_type,
 349            flash_object=flash_object,
 350            selected_object_ids=selected_object_ids,
 351            max_units_affected=max_units_affected,
 352        )

 385    def display_instructions(
 386            self,
 387            object_list_unit_id: int | None = None,
 388            source_player: int | None = None,
 389            string_id: int | None = None,
 390            display_time: int | None = None,
 391            instruction_panel_position: int | None = None,
 392            play_sound: int | None = None,
 393            message: str | None = None,
 394            sound_name: str | None = None,
 395    ) -> Effect:
 396        return self._trigger_ref._add_effect(
 397            EffectId.DISPLAY_INSTRUCTIONS,
 398            object_list_unit_id=object_list_unit_id,
 399            source_player=source_player,
 400            string_id=string_id,
 401            display_time=display_time,
 402            instruction_panel_position=instruction_panel_position,
 403            play_sound=play_sound,
 404            message=message,
 405            sound_name=sound_name,
 406        )
 407
 408    def clear_instructions(
 409            self,

 411    ) -> Effect:
 412        return self._trigger_ref._add_effect(
 413            EffectId.CLEAR_INSTRUCTIONS,
 414            instruction_panel_position=instruction_panel_position,
 415        )

 829            self,

 833            timer: int | None = None,
 834            reset_timer: int | None = None,

 836    ) -> Effect:

 840            display_time=display_time,
 841            time_unit=time_unit,
 842            timer=timer,
 843            reset_timer=reset_timer,
 844            message=message,

 857            enabled=enabled,

 873    def change_object_cost(
 874            self,
 875            object_list_unit_id: int | None = None,
 876            source_player: int | None = None,
 877            resource_1: int | None = None,
 878            resource_1_quantity: int | None = None,
 879            resource_2: int | None = None,
 880            resource_2_quantity: int | None = None,
 881            resource_3: int | None = None,
 882            resource_3_quantity: int | None = None,
 883    ) -> Effect:
 884        return self._trigger_ref._add_effect(
 885            EffectId.CHANGE_OBJECT_COST,
 886            object_list_unit_id=object_list_unit_id,
 887            source_player=source_player,
 888            resource_1=resource_1,
 889            resource_1_quantity=resource_1_quantity,
 890            resource_2=resource_2,
 891            resource_2_quantity=resource_2_quantity,
 892            resource_3=resource_3,
 893            resource_3_quantity=resource_3_quantity,
 894        )

 896    def set_player_visibility(
 897            self,
 898            source_player: int | None = None,
 899            target_player: int | None = None,
 900            visibility_state: int | None = None,
 901    ) -> Effect:
 902        return self._trigger_ref._add_effect(
 903            EffectId.SET_PLAYER_VISIBILITY,
 904            source_player=source_player,
 905            target_player=target_player,
 906            visibility_state=visibility_state,
 907        )
 908
 909    def change_object_icon(
 910            self,
 911            object_list_unit_id: int | None = None,
 912            source_player: int | None = None,
 913            area_x1: int | None = None,
 914            area_y1: int | None = None,
 915            area_x2: int | None = None,
 916            area_y2: int | None = None,
 917            object_group: int | None = None,
 918            object_type: int | None = None,
 919            object_list_unit_id_2: int | None = None,
 920            selected_object_ids: int | List[int] | None = None,
 921            max_units_affected: int | None = None,

 923        return self._trigger_ref._add_effect(

 930            area_y2=area_y2,

 934            selected_object_ids=selected_object_ids,

 936        )

 939            self,
 940            object_list_unit_id: int | None = None,

 942            target_player: int | None = None,
 943            area_x1: int | None = None,
 944            area_y1: int | None = None,
 945            area_x2: int | None = None,
 946            area_y2: int | None = None,
 947            object_group: int | None = None,
 948            object_type: int | None = None,
 949            object_list_unit_id_2: int | None = None,
 950            selected_object_ids: int | List[int] | None = None,
 951            facet2: int | None = None,
 952            max_units_affected: int | None = None,
 953    ) -> Effect:
 954        return self._trigger_ref._add_effect(
 955            EffectId.REPLACE_OBJECT,
 956            object_list_unit_id=object_list_unit_id,
 957            source_player=source_player,
 958            target_player=target_player,
 959            area_x1=area_x1,
 960            area_y1=area_y1,
 961            area_x2=area_x2,
 962            area_y2=area_y2,
 963            object_group=object_group,
 964            object_type=object_type,
 965            object_list_unit_id_2=object_list_unit_id_2,
 966            selected_object_ids=selected_object_ids,
 967            facet2=facet2,
 968            max_units_affected=max_units_affected,
 969        )

1067            selected_object_ids: int | List[int] | None = None,
1068            max_units_affected: int | None = None,
1069            disable_sound: int | None = None,
1070    ) -> Effect:
1071        return self._trigger_ref._add_effect(
1072            EffectId.CREATE_GARRISONED_OBJECT,
1073            object_list_unit_id=object_list_unit_id,
1074            source_player=source_player,

1076            area_y1=area_y1,
1077            area_x2=area_x2,
1078            area_y2=area_y2,
1079            object_list_unit_id_2=object_list_unit_id_2,

1083        )

1085    def acknowledge_ai_signal(
1086            self,
1087            ai_signal_value: int | None = None,
1088    ) -> Effect:
1089        return self._trigger_ref._add_effect(
1090            EffectId.ACKNOWLEDGE_AI_SIGNAL,
1091            ai_signal_value=ai_signal_value,
1092        )
1093
1094    def modify_attribute(
1095            self,
1096            quantity: int | None = None,
1097            armour_attack_quantity: int | None = None,
1098            armour_attack_class: int | None = None,
1099            object_list_unit_id: int | None = None,
1100            source_player: int | None = None,
1101            operation: int | None = None,
1102            object_attributes: int | None = None,
1103            message: str | None = None,
1104    ) -> Effect:
1105        """
1106        The parameters 'armour_attack_quantity' and 'armour_attack_class' are only used when object_attributes is Armor
1107        or Attack (8 or 9). Use, 'quantity' otherwise.
1108        """
1109        if (armour_attack_quantity is not None or armour_attack_class is not None) and quantity is not None:
1110            raise ValueError("Cannot use 'armour_attack' attributes together with the 'quantity' attribute.")
1111
1112        return self._trigger_ref._add_effect(
1113            EffectId.MODIFY_ATTRIBUTE,
1114            quantity=quantity,
1115            armour_attack_quantity=armour_attack_quantity,
1116            armour_attack_class=armour_attack_class,
1117            object_list_unit_id=object_list_unit_id,
1118            source_player=source_player,
1119            operation=operation,
1120            object_attributes=object_attributes,
1121            message=message
1122        )
1123
1124    def modify_resource(
1125            self,
1126            quantity: int | None = None,
1127            tribute_list: int | None = None,
1128            source_player: int | None = None,
1129            operation: int | None = None,
1130    ) -> Effect:
1131        return self._trigger_ref._add_effect(
1132            EffectId.MODIFY_RESOURCE,
1133            quantity=quantity,
1134            tribute_list=tribute_list,
1135            source_player=source_player,
1136            operation=operation,
1137        )
1138
1139    def modify_resource_by_variable(
1140            self,
1141            tribute_list: int | None = None,
1142            source_player: int | None = None,
1143            operation: int | None = None,
1144            variable: int | None = None,
1145    ) -> Effect:
1146        return self._trigger_ref._add_effect(
1147            EffectId.MODIFY_RESOURCE_BY_VARIABLE,
1148            tribute_list=tribute_list,
1149            source_player=source_player,
1150            operation=operation,
1151            variable=variable,
1152        )
1153
1154    def set_building_gather_point(
1155            self,
1156            object_list_unit_id: int | None = None,

1165            max_units_affected: int | None = None,
1166    ) -> Effect:
1167        return self._trigger_ref._add_effect(

1169            object_list_unit_id=object_list_unit_id,
1170            source_player=source_player,
1171            location_x=location_x,
1172            location_y=location_y,

1174            area_y1=area_y1,
1175            area_x2=area_x2,
1176            area_y2=area_y2,
1177            selected_object_ids=selected_object_ids,
1178            max_units_affected=max_units_affected,
1179        )

1181    def script_call(
1182            self,

1186        return self._trigger_ref._add_effect(

1190        )

1494    def enable_object_deletion(
1495            self,
1496            object_list_unit_id: int | None = None,
1497            source_player: int | None = None,
1498            area_x1: int | None = None,
1499            area_y1: int | None = None,
1500            area_x2: int | None = None,
1501            area_y2: int | None = None,
1502            selected_object_ids: int | List[int] | None = None,
1503            max_units_affected: int | None = None,
1504    ):
1505        return self._trigger_ref._add_effect(
1506            EffectId.ENABLE_OBJECT_DELETION,
1507            object_list_unit_id=object_list_unit_id,
1508            source_player=source_player,
1509            area_x1=area_x1,
1510            area_y1=area_y1,
1511            area_x2=area_x2,
1512            area_y2=area_y2,
1513            selected_object_ids=selected_object_ids,
1514            max_units_affected=max_units_affected,
1515        )
1516
1517    def disable_object_deletion(
1518            self,
1519            object_list_unit_id: int | None = None,
1520            source_player: int | None = None,
1521            area_x1: int | None = None,
1522            area_y1: int | None = None,
1523            area_x2: int | None = None,
1524            area_y2: int | None = None,
1525            selected_object_ids: int | List[int] | None = None,
1526            max_units_affected: int | None = None,
1527    ):
1528        return self._trigger_ref._add_effect(
1529            EffectId.DISABLE_OBJECT_DELETION,
1530            object_list_unit_id=object_list_unit_id,
1531            source_player=source_player,
1532            area_x1=area_x1,
1533            area_y1=area_y1,
1534            area_x2=area_x2,
1535            area_y2=area_y2,
1536            selected_object_ids=selected_object_ids,
1537            max_units_affected=max_units_affected,
1538        )
1539
1540    def train_unit(
1541            self,
1542            quantity: int | None = None,
1543            object_list_unit_id: int | None = None,
1544            source_player: int | None = None,
1545            location_x: int | None = None,
1546            location_y: int | None = None,
1547            area_x1: int | None = None,
1548            area_y1: int | None = None,
1549            area_x2: int | None = None,
1550            area_y2: int | None = None,
1551            selected_object_ids: int | List[int] | None = None,
1552            max_units_affected: int | None = None,
1553    ):
1554        return self._trigger_ref._add_effect(
1555            EffectId.TRAIN_UNIT,
1556            quantity=quantity,
1557            object_list_unit_id=object_list_unit_id,
1558            source_player=source_player,
1559            location_x=location_x,
1560            location_y=location_y,
1561            area_x1=area_x1,
1562            area_y1=area_y1,
1563            area_x2=area_x2,
1564            area_y2=area_y2,
1565            selected_object_ids=selected_object_ids,
1566            max_units_affected=max_units_affected,
1567        )
1568
1569    def initiate_research(
1570            self,
1571            source_player: int | None = None,
1572            technology: int | None = None,
1573            selected_object_ids: int | List[int] | None = None,
1574    ):
1575        return self._trigger_ref._add_effect(
1576            EffectId.INITIATE_RESEARCH,
1577            source_player=source_player,
1578            technology=technology,
1579            selected_object_ids=selected_object_ids
1580        )
1581
1582    def create_object_attack(
1583            self,
1584            armour_attack_quantity: int | None = None,
1585            armour_attack_class: int | None = None,
1586            object_list_unit_id: int | None = None,
1587            source_player: int | None = None,
1588            area_x1: int | None = None,
1589            area_y1: int | None = None,
1590            area_x2: int | None = None,
1591            area_y2: int | None = None,
1592            object_group: int | None = None,
1593            object_type: int | None = None,
1594            operation: int | None = None,
1595            selected_object_ids: int | List[int] | None = None,
1596            max_units_affected: int | None = None,
1597    ):
1598        return self._trigger_ref._add_effect(
1599            EffectId.CREATE_OBJECT_ATTACK,
1600            armour_attack_quantity=armour_attack_quantity,
1601            armour_attack_class=armour_attack_class,
1602            object_list_unit_id=object_list_unit_id,
1603            source_player=source_player,
1604            area_x1=area_x1,
1605            area_y1=area_y1,
1606            area_x2=area_x2,
1607            area_y2=area_y2,
1608            object_group=object_group,
1609            object_type=object_type,
1610            operation=operation,
1611            selected_object_ids=selected_object_ids,
1612            max_units_affected=max_units_affected,
1613        )
1614
1615    def create_object_armor(
1616            self,
1617            armour_attack_quantity: int | None = None,
1618            armour_attack_class: int | None = None,
1619            object_list_unit_id: int | None = None,
1620            source_player: int | None = None,
1621            area_x1: int | None = None,
1622            area_y1: int | None = None,
1623            area_x2: int | None = None,
1624            area_y2: int | None = None,
1625            object_group: int | None = None,
1626            object_type: int | None = None,
1627            operation: int | None = None,
1628            selected_object_ids: int | List[int] | None = None,
1629            max_units_affected: int | None = None,
1630    ):
1631        return self._trigger_ref._add_effect(
1632            EffectId.CREATE_OBJECT_ARMOR,
1633            armour_attack_quantity=armour_attack_quantity,
1634            armour_attack_class=armour_attack_class,
1635            object_list_unit_id=object_list_unit_id,
1636            source_player=source_player,
1637            area_x1=area_x1,
1638            area_y1=area_y1,
1639            area_x2=area_x2,
1640            area_y2=area_y2,
1641            object_group=object_group,
1642            object_type=object_type,
1643            operation=operation,
1644            selected_object_ids=selected_object_ids,
1645            max_units_affected=max_units_affected,
1646        )
1647
1648    def modify_attribute_by_variable(
1649            self,
1650            object_list_unit_id: int | None = None,
1651            source_player: int | None = None,
1652            operation: int | None = None,
1653            object_attributes: int | None = None,
1654            variable: int | None = None,
1655            message: str | None = None,
1656            armour_attack_class: int | None = None,
1657    ):
1658        if armour_attack_class is not None and object_attributes not in (ObjectAttribute.ATTACK, ObjectAttribute.ARMOR):
1659            raise ValueError("Cannot use 'armour_attack_class' for non attack/armor attributes.")
1660
1661        return self._trigger_ref._add_effect(
1662            EffectId.MODIFY_ATTRIBUTE_BY_VARIABLE,
1663            armour_attack_class=armour_attack_class,
1664            object_list_unit_id=object_list_unit_id,
1665            source_player=source_player,
1666            operation=operation,
1667            object_attributes=object_attributes,
1668            variable=variable,
1669            message=message,
1670        )
1671
1672    def set_object_cost(
1673            self,
1674            object_list_unit_id: int | None = None,
1675            source_player: int | None = None,
1676            quantity: int | None = None,
1677            tribute_list: int | None = None,
1678    ) -> Effect:
1679        return self._trigger_ref._add_effect(
1680            EffectId.SET_OBJECT_COST,
1681            object_list_unit_id=object_list_unit_id,
1682            source_player=source_player,
1683            quantity=quantity,
1684            tribute_list=tribute_list,
1685        )
1686

1688            self,
1689            variable: int | None = None,
1690            message: str | None = None,
1691            quantity: int | None = None,
1692    ) -> Effect:
1693        return self._trigger_ref._add_effect(
1694            EffectId.LOAD_KEY_VALUE,
1695            variable=variable,
1696            message=message,
1697            quantity=quantity,
1698        )
1699
1700    def store_key_value(
1701            self,

1704    ) -> Effect:
1705        return self._trigger_ref._add_effect(
1706            EffectId.STORE_KEY_VALUE,
1707            variable=variable,
1708            message=message,
1709        )

1711    def delete_key(
1712            self,
1713            message: str | None = None,
1714    ) -> Effect:
1715        return self._trigger_ref._add_effect(
1716            EffectId.DELETE_KEY,
1717            message=message,
1718        )

1761    def modify_variable_by_attribute(

1767            variable: int | None = None,
1768            message: str | None = None,
1769            armour_attack_class: int | None = None,
1770    ):
1771        if armour_attack_class is not None and object_attributes not in (ObjectAttribute.ATTACK, ObjectAttribute.ARMOR):
1772            raise ValueError("Cannot use 'armour_attack_class' for non attack/armor attributes.")
1773
1774        return self._trigger_ref._add_effect(
1775            EffectId.MODIFY_VARIABLE_BY_ATTRIBUTE,
1776            armour_attack_class=armour_attack_class,
1777            object_list_unit_id=object_list_unit_id,
1778            source_player=source_player,

1785    def change_object_caption(
1786            self,
1787            object_list_unit_id: int | None = None,
1788            source_player: int | None = None,

1790            message: str | None = None,
1791            area_x1: int | None = None,
1792            area_y1: int | None = None,
1793            area_x2: int | None = None,
1794            area_y2: int | None = None,
1795            selected_object_ids: int | List[int] | None = None,
1796    ):
1797        return self._trigger_ref._add_effect(
1798            EffectId.CHANGE_OBJECT_CAPTION,
1799            object_list_unit_id=object_list_unit_id,
1800            source_player=source_player,
1801            string_id=string_id,
1802            message=message,
1803            area_x1=area_x1,
1804            area_y1=area_y1,
1805            area_x2=area_x2,
1806            area_y2=area_y2,
1807            selected_object_ids=selected_object_ids,
1808        )

1822            self,

1826            string_id_option1: int | None = None,
1827            message_option1: str | None = None,
1828            string_id_option2: int | None = None,
1829            message_option2: str | None = None,
1830    ):
1831        return self._trigger_ref._add_effect(
1832            EffectId.CREATE_DECISION,
1833            decision_id=decision_id,
1834            string_id=string_id,
1835            message=message,
1836            string_id_option1=string_id_option1,

1842    def disable_unit_attackable(
1843            self,
1844            object_list_unit_id: int | None = None,
1845            source_player: int | None = None,
1846            area_x1: int | None = None,
1847            area_y1: int | None = None,
1848            area_x2: int | None = None,
1849            area_y2: int | None = None,
1850            selected_object_ids: int | List[int] | None = None,
1851            max_units_affected: int | None = None,
1852    ) -> Effect:
1853        return self._trigger_ref._add_effect(
1854            EffectId.DISABLE_UNIT_ATTACKABLE,
1855            object_list_unit_id=object_list_unit_id,
1856            source_player=source_player,
1857            area_x1=area_x1,
1858            area_y1=area_y1,
1859            area_x2=area_x2,
1860            area_y2=area_y2,
1861            selected_object_ids=selected_object_ids,
1862            max_units_affected=max_units_affected,
1863        )
1864
1865    def enable_unit_attackable(
1866            self,
1867            object_list_unit_id: int | None = None,
1868            source_player: int | None = None,
1869            area_x1: int | None = None,
1870            area_y1: int | None = None,
1871            area_x2: int | None = None,
1872            area_y2: int | None = None,
1873            selected_object_ids: int | List[int] | None = None,
1874            max_units_affected: int | None = None,
1875    ) -> Effect:
1876        return self._trigger_ref._add_effect(
1877            EffectId.ENABLE_UNIT_ATTACKABLE,
1878            object_list_unit_id=object_list_unit_id,
1879            source_player=source_player,
1880            area_x1=area_x1,
1881            area_y1=area_y1,
1882            area_x2=area_x2,
1883            area_y2=area_y2,
1884            selected_object_ids=selected_object_ids,
1885            max_units_affected=max_units_affected,
1886        )
1887
1888    def modify_variable_by_variable(
1889            self,
1890            variable: int | None = None,
1891            operation: int | None = None,
1892            variable2: int | None = None,
1893    ):
1894        """
1895        How it works:
1896
1897        variable { operation }= variable2
1898
1899        Examples:
1900
1901            Operation.SET: variable = variable2
1902            Operation.ADD: variable = variable + variable2
1903            Operation.SUBTRACT: variable = variable - variable2
1904            Operation.DIVIDE: variable = variable / variable2
1905            Operation.MULTIPLY: variable = variable * variable2
1906        """
1907        return self._trigger_ref._add_effect(
1908            EffectId.MODIFY_VARIABLE_BY_VARIABLE,
1909            variable=variable,  # Destination!
1910            operation=operation,
1911            variable2=variable2,  # Modifier!
1912        )
1913
1914    def count_units_into_variable(
1915            self,
1916            object_list_unit_id: int | None = None,
1917            source_player: int | None = None,
1918            area_x1: int | None = None,
1919            area_y1: int | None = None,
1920            area_x2: int | None = None,
1921            area_y2: int | None = None,
1922            object_group: int | None = None,
1923            variable2: int | None = None,
1924    ):
1925        return self._trigger_ref._add_effect(
1926            EffectId.COUNT_UNITS_INTO_VARIABLE,
1927            object_list_unit_id=object_list_unit_id,
1928            source_player=source_player,
1929            area_x1=area_x1,
1930            area_y1=area_y1,
1931            area_x2=area_x2,
1932            area_y2=area_y2,
1933            object_group=object_group,
1934            variable2=variable2,
1935        )
1936
1937    def add_train_location(
1938            self,
1939            object_list_unit_id: int | None = None,
1940            source_player: int | None = None,
1941            object_list_unit_id_2: int | None = None,
1942            button_location: int | None = None,
1943            train_time: int | None = None,
1944            hotkey: int | None = None,
1945    ):

1947            EffectId.ADD_TRAIN_LOCATION,

1949            source_player=source_player,
1950            object_list_unit_id_2=object_list_unit_id_2,
1951            button_location=button_location,
1952            train_time=train_time,
1953            hotkey=hotkey,
1954        )
