1956    def research_local_technology(
1957            self,
1958            local_technology: int | None = None,
1959            source_player: int | None = None,
1960            selected_object_ids: int | List[int] | None = None,
1961            area_x1: int | None = None,
1962            area_y1: int | None = None,
1963            area_x2: int | None = None,
1964            area_y2: int | None = None,
1965            object_list_unit_id_2: int | None = None,
1966    ):
1967        return self._trigger_ref._add_effect(
1968            EffectId.RESEARCH_LOCAL_TECHNOLOGY,
1969            local_technology=local_technology,
1970            source_player=source_player,
1971            selected_object_ids=selected_object_ids,
1972            area_x1=area_x1,
1973            area_y1=area_y1,
1974            area_x2=area_x2,
1975            area_y2=area_y2,
1976            object_list_unit_id_2=object_list_unit_id_2,
1977        )
1978
1979    def modify_attribute_for_class(
1980            self,
1981            object_group2: int | None = None,
1982            object_type2: int | None = None,
1983            source_player: int | None = None,
1984            object_attributes: int | None = None,
1985            message: int | None = None,
1986            operation: int | None = None,
1987            quantity: int | float | None = None,
1988            armour_attack_quantity: int | None = None,
1989            armour_attack_class: int | None = None,
1990    ):
1991        if (armour_attack_quantity is not None or armour_attack_class is not None) and quantity is not None:
1992            raise ValueError("Cannot use 'armour_attack' attributes together with the 'quantity' attribute.")
1993
1994        return self._trigger_ref._add_effect(
1995            EffectId.MODIFY_ATTRIBUTE_FOR_CLASS,
1996            object_group2=object_group2,
1997            object_type2=object_type2,
1998            source_player=source_player,
1999            object_attributes=object_attributes,
2000            message=message,
2001            operation=operation,
2002            quantity=quantity,
2003            armour_attack_quantity=armour_attack_quantity,
2004            armour_attack_class=armour_attack_class,
2005        )
2006
2007    def modify_object_attribute(
2008            self,
2009            object_list_unit_id: int | None = None,
2010            source_player: int | None = None,
2011            object_attributes: int | None = None,
2012            selected_object_ids: int | List[int] | None = None,
2013            area_x1: int | None = None,
2014            area_y1: int | None = None,
2015            area_x2: int | None = None,
2016            area_y2: int | None = None,
2017            operation: int | None = None,
2018            message: str | None = None,
2019            quantity: int | float | None = None,
2020            armour_attack_quantity: int | None = None,
2021            armour_attack_class: int | None = None,
2022    ):
2023        if (armour_attack_quantity is not None or armour_attack_class is not None) and quantity is not None:
2024            raise ValueError("Cannot use 'armour_attack' attributes together with the 'quantity' attribute.")
2025
2026        return self._trigger_ref._add_effect(
2027            EffectId.MODIFY_OBJECT_ATTRIBUTE,
2028            object_list_unit_id=object_list_unit_id,
2029            source_player=source_player,
2030            object_attributes=object_attributes,
2031            selected_object_ids=selected_object_ids,
2032            area_x1=area_x1,
2033            area_y1=area_y1,
2034            area_x2=area_x2,
2035            area_y2=area_y2,
2036            operation=operation,
2037            message=message,
2038            quantity=quantity,
2039            armour_attack_quantity=armour_attack_quantity,
2040            armour_attack_class=armour_attack_class,
2041        )
2042
2043    def modify_object_attribute_by_variable(
2044            self,
2045            object_list_unit_id: int | None = None,
2046            source_player: int | None = None,
2047            object_attributes: int | None = None,
2048            selected_object_ids: int | List[int] | None = None,
2049            area_x1: int | None = None,
2050            area_y1: int | None = None,
2051            area_x2: int | None = None,
2052            area_y2: int | None = None,
2053            operation: int | None = None,
2054            message: str | None = None,
2055            variable: int | None = None,
2056            armour_attack_class: int | None = None,
2057    ):
2058
2059        if armour_attack_class is not None and object_attributes not in (ObjectAttribute.ATTACK, ObjectAttribute.ARMOR):
2060            raise ValueError("Cannot use 'armour_attack_class' for non attack/armor attributes.")
2061
2062        return self._trigger_ref._add_effect(
2063            EffectId.MODIFY_OBJECT_ATTRIBUTE_BY_VARIABLE,
2064            object_list_unit_id=object_list_unit_id,
2065            source_player=source_player,
2066            object_attributes=object_attributes,
2067            selected_object_ids=selected_object_ids,

2075            armour_attack_class=armour_attack_class,
2076        )

2081            target_player: int | None = None,

2086            visibility_state: int | None = None,
2087            max_units_affected: int | None = None,
2088            selected_object_ids: int | None = None,

2103    def build_object(
2104            self,
2105            object_list_unit_id: int | None = None,
2106            source_player: int | None = None,
2107            location_x: int | None = None,
2108            location_y: int | None = None,
2109            location_object_reference: int | None = None,
2110            area_x1: int | None = None,
2111            area_y1: int | None = None,
2112            area_x2: int | None = None,
2113            area_y2: int | None = None,
2114            wall_x1: int | None = None,
2115            wall_y1: int | None = None,
2116            wall_x2: int | None = None,
2117            wall_y2: int | None = None,
2118            object_group: int | None = None,
2119            object_type: int | None = None,
2120            building_list: int | None = None,
2121            selected_object_ids: int | List[int] | None = None,
2122            disable_garrison_unload_sound: int | None = None,
2123            max_units_affected: int | None = None,
2124            issue_group_command: int | None = None,
2125            queue_action: int | None = None,
2126    ) -> Effect:
2127        return self._trigger_ref._add_effect(
2128            EffectId.BUILD_OBJECT,
2129            object_list_unit_id=object_list_unit_id,
2130            source_player=source_player,
2131            location_x=location_x,
2132            location_y=location_y,
2133            location_object_reference=location_object_reference,
2134            area_x1=area_x1,
2135            area_y1=area_y1,
2136            area_x2=area_x2,
2137            area_y2=area_y2,
2138            wall_x1=wall_x1,
2139            wall_y1=wall_y1,
2140            wall_x2=wall_x2,

2143            object_type=object_type,
2144            building_list=building_list,
2145            selected_object_ids=selected_object_ids,
2146            disable_garrison_unload_sound=disable_garrison_unload_sound,
2147            max_units_affected=max_units_affected,
2148            issue_group_command=issue_group_command,
2149            queue_action=queue_action,
2150        )

def modify_attribute( self, quantity: 'int | None' = None, armour_attack_quantity: 'int | None' = None, armour_attack_class: 'int | None' = None, object_list_unit_id: 'int | None' = None, source_player: 'int | None' = None, operation: 'int | None' = None, object_attributes: 'int | None' = None, message: 'str | None' = None) -> AoE2ScenarioParser.objects.data_objects.effect.Effect: 
1094    def modify_attribute(
1095            self,
1096            quantity: int | None = None,
1097            armour_attack_quantity: int | None = None,
1098            armour_attack_class: int | None = None,
1099            object_list_unit_id: int | None = None,
1100            source_player: int | None = None,
1101            operation: int | None = None,
1102            object_attributes: int | None = None,
1103            message: str | None = None,
1104    ) -> Effect:
1105        """
1106        The parameters 'armour_attack_quantity' and 'armour_attack_class' are only used when object_attributes is Armor
1107        or Attack (8 or 9). Use, 'quantity' otherwise.
1108        """
1109        if (armour_attack_quantity is not None or armour_attack_class is not None) and quantity is not None:
1110            raise ValueError("Cannot use 'armour_attack' attributes together with the 'quantity' attribute.")
1111
1112        return self._trigger_ref._add_effect(
1113            EffectId.MODIFY_ATTRIBUTE,
1114            quantity=quantity,
1115            armour_attack_quantity=armour_attack_quantity,
1116            armour_attack_class=armour_attack_class,
1117            object_list_unit_id=object_list_unit_id,
1118            source_player=source_player,
1119            operation=operation,
1120            object_attributes=object_attributes,
1121            message=message
1122        )

The parameters 'armour_attack_quantity' and 'armour_attack_class' are only used when object_attributes is Armor or Attack (8 or 9). Use, 'quantity' otherwise.

def modify_attribute_by_variable( self, object_list_unit_id: 'int | None' = None, source_player: 'int | None' = None, operation: 'int | None' = None, object_attributes: 'int | None' = None, variable: 'int | None' = None, message: 'str | None' = None, armour_attack_class: 'int | None' = None): 
1648    def modify_attribute_by_variable(
1649            self,
1650            object_list_unit_id: int | None = None,
1651            source_player: int | None = None,
1652            operation: int | None = None,
1653            object_attributes: int | None = None,
1654            variable: int | None = None,
1655            message: str | None = None,
1656            armour_attack_class: int | None = None,
1657    ):
1658        if armour_attack_class is not None and object_attributes not in (ObjectAttribute.ATTACK, ObjectAttribute.ARMOR):
1659            raise ValueError("Cannot use 'armour_attack_class' for non attack/armor attributes.")
1660
1661        return self._trigger_ref._add_effect(
1662            EffectId.MODIFY_ATTRIBUTE_BY_VARIABLE,
1663            armour_attack_class=armour_attack_class,
1664            object_list_unit_id=object_list_unit_id,
1665            source_player=source_player,
1666            operation=operation,
1667            object_attributes=object_attributes,
1668            variable=variable,
1669            message=message,
1670        )

1750            operation: int | None = None,
1751            variable: int | None = None,
1752    ) -> Effect:
1753        return self._trigger_ref._add_effect(
1754            EffectId.MODIFY_VARIABLE_BY_RESOURCE,
1755            tribute_list=tribute_list,
1756            source_player=source_player,
1757            operation=operation,
1758            variable=variable,

def modify_variable_by_attribute( self, object_list_unit_id: 'int | None' = None, source_player: 'int | None' = None, operation: 'int | None' = None, object_attributes: 'int | None' = None, variable: 'int | None' = None, message: 'str | None' = None, armour_attack_class: 'int | None' = None):

1771        if armour_attack_class is not None and object_attributes not in (ObjectAttribute.ATTACK, ObjectAttribute.ARMOR):
1772            raise ValueError("Cannot use 'armour_attack_class' for non attack/armor attributes.")

def modify_variable_by_variable( self, variable: 'int | None' = None, operation: 'int | None' = None, variable2: 'int | None' = None): 
1888    def modify_variable_by_variable(
1889            self,
1890            variable: int | None = None,
1891            operation: int | None = None,
1892            variable2: int | None = None,
1893    ):
1894        """
1895        How it works:
1896
1897        variable { operation }= variable2
1898
1899        Examples:
1900
1901            Operation.SET: variable = variable2
1902            Operation.ADD: variable = variable + variable2
1903            Operation.SUBTRACT: variable = variable - variable2
1904            Operation.DIVIDE: variable = variable / variable2
1905            Operation.MULTIPLY: variable = variable * variable2
1906        """
1907        return self._trigger_ref._add_effect(
1908            EffectId.MODIFY_VARIABLE_BY_VARIABLE,
1909            variable=variable,  # Destination!
1910            operation=operation,
1911            variable2=variable2,  # Modifier!
1912        )

How it works:

variable { operation }= variable2

Examples:

Operation.SET: variable = variable2
Operation.ADD: variable = variable + variable2
Operation.SUBTRACT: variable = variable - variable2
Operation.DIVIDE: variable = variable / variable2
Operation.MULTIPLY: variable = variable * variable2

def modify_attribute_for_class( self, object_group2: 'int | None' = None, object_type2: 'int | None' = None, source_player: 'int | None' = None, object_attributes: 'int | None' = None, message: 'int | None' = None, operation: 'int | None' = None, quantity: 'int | float | None' = None, armour_attack_quantity: 'int | None' = None, armour_attack_class: 'int | None' = None):

1980            self,

1989            armour_attack_class: int | None = None,
1990    ):

1992            raise ValueError("Cannot use 'armour_attack' attributes together with the 'quantity' attribute.")
1993
